description: e^{iπ} chain lands exactly on −1 through the split, ln(−1) = iπ in both coordinates, and the sine-arch integral chain reaches 2 through its bracket step
i\pi fully braced in the exponent, \pi in the integral bound braces, minus sign inside the evaluation bracket, \, before dx
The identity goes through cos(π) + i·sin(π), and the finale shows integral = bracket = answer — derivations to the very last line
The page reads as a closing chapter: clean text, markers kept, the loop back to page one visible
